Purchasing Intelligence

Stop guessing what to buy.
brandhub tells you exactly.

The Demand Planning module combines monthly velocity, current inventory, lead times, and safety stock targets to generate a precise reorder quantity for every item — automatically. Here's the workflow.

Create PO
